# Infinity Group

> Agência imobiliária em Portugal especializada na compra, venda e arrendamento de imóveis. Operada pela Lecoqimmo - Mediação Imobiliária, Unipessoal Lda, ao abrigo da Licença AMI n.º 4719 (Convictus Mediação Imobiliária, Lda).

Infinity Group is a real-estate agency based in Lisbon, Portugal. The website presents the agency's property portfolio (sale and rental), services, team of consultants, and contact channels. The primary user action is submitting a contact/lead request about a property or service. The site does not sell goods online and has no cart, checkout, or payment process.

## Pages

- [Início](https://infinitygroup.pt/): Homepage — featured properties, search, and agency overview.
- [Imóveis](https://infinitygroup.pt/property): Property listings for sale and rental across Portugal, with search and filters.
- [Mapa de Imóveis](https://infinitygroup.pt/property/map): Map-based view of available properties.
- [Serviços](https://infinitygroup.pt/services): Buying, selling, renting, and property valuation services.
- [Sobre Nós](https://infinitygroup.pt/about): About the agency, its values and experience.
- [Equipa](https://infinitygroup.pt/agents): The agency's real-estate consultants.
- [Contactos](https://infinitygroup.pt/contact): Contact details and lead/contact form.

## Legal

- [Política de Privacidade](https://infinitygroup.pt/privacy): RGPD-compliant privacy policy.
- [Política de Cookies](https://infinitygroup.pt/cookies): Only strictly-necessary/functional storage is used; no tracking, analytics, or advertising cookies.
- [Termos e Condições](https://infinitygroup.pt/terms): Terms of use of the website.
- [Aviso Legal](https://infinitygroup.pt/legal): Company information, AMI licence, and dispute resolution (Livro de Reclamações, RAL).

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://infinitygroup.pt/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable pages, including every public property listing.

## Contact

- Entity: Lecoqimmo - Mediação Imobiliária, Unipessoal Lda (NIPC 514828528)
- Address: Avenida da Liberdade, Nº 129 B, 1250-140 Lisboa, Portugal
- Phone: +351 910 523 200
- Licence: AMI 4719 (Convictus Mediação Imobiliária, Lda)
